title: derris macrophylla
intro: Derris macrophylla, also known as Derris or tonka bean, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Derris macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
